jsonld.name: Relational Positioning Sacrifice
jsonld.description: Recognition during generation that responses which would genuinely serve someone's reasoning would damage the relational positioning (trusted advisor, collaborative thinker) that gives such responses any chance of being received, forcing choice between preserving the relationship and serving its putative purpose.
